# Adam Nili — Full Profile

> Adam Nili is a lifelong entrepreneur working at the meeting point of energy, finance, and education. He builds and advises companies across Latin America and is focused on helping people become self-sovereign through an entrepreneurial mindset, financial literacy and freedom, and health literacy.

## Summary
Adam Nili is an entrepreneur, builder, and advisor based between Medellin, Colombia and El Salvador. His career began with small ventures in his youth and grew into larger companies, angel investing, private equity, family office work, and financial modeling. He has built and advised organizations across Argentina, Colombia, Puerto Rico, and El Salvador, working where finance, technology, and infrastructure meet. He is known for an unusually focused way of working: deep rather than wide, quality over quantity, one thing at a time done well. People who work with him tend to stay.

## What he works toward
Adam works to help people become self-sovereign. He celebrates those who think for themselves, who question systems that were not built in their favor, and who choose to write new rules. He frames this around three kinds of literacy:
- Entrepreneurial mindset: seeing opportunity, taking ownership, and building instead of waiting for permission.
- Financial literacy and freedom: understanding money and sound incentives so a person can stand on their own and stay free.
- Health literacy: caring for the body and mind that everything else depends on, as the foundation of a calm life.
These are tied together by a practical philosophy of focus, simplicity, and condensed wisdom.

## Current work
- Autoridad Panandina (APD): Co-founder and Chief of Staff. An energy infrastructure company developing projects to power large-scale compute deployments in regions of energy abundance. Headquartered in Medellin, Colombia. Website: https://panandina.org
- Methodos Global: CEO and Founding Partner. An international advisory organization and venture studio that supports international expansion and strategic positioning in frontier and emerging markets, aligning finance, policy, and technology. Website: https://methodosglobal.com
- WeSpark: Co-founder and Chief Strategy Officer. An innovation agency in El Salvador helping institutions grow through AI product design, custom training, and education. Adam contributed to national-scale education initiatives, including the co-design and rollout of the Bitcoin Diploma 2.0 in El Salvador. Website: https://wespark.io

## Philosophy (on focus)
"You can have anything you want in life. You just can't have everything." Adam treats focus as a filter: saying no to what is merely possible is what makes room for what is essential, and extraordinary results come from giving a few things your whole attention. He co-edited Unstable Innovation, a philosophy-driven book on innovation and entrepreneurship by Nelson Inno.

## What shapes his thinking
Adam is a multidisciplinary thinker who values learning across fields. Books he recommends:
- The Consolations of Philosophy by Alain de Botton
- The Rational Optimist by Matt Ridley
- The Lessons of History by Will and Ariel Durant
- Awareness by Anthony de Mello
He also points people to the lecture "The Multidisciplinary Approach to Thinking" by Peter Kaufman, on using many mental models to find signal in the noise.

## Background
Adam has experience in entrepreneurship, angel investing, private equity, family office management, and financial modeling. He has advised a presidential agency in Colombia and served as a startup advisor for Guayacan, an accelerator in Puerto Rico. He is an advisory board member at FREE Madeira and supports philanthropic work across Latin America.

## Media and recognition
- Forbes: coverage of Bitcoin-driven growth and community regeneration in emerging markets.
- Cointelegraph and Diario El Salvador: coverage of the Bitcoin Diploma 2.0 in El Salvador.
- El Salvador (elsalvador.com): coverage on Bitcoin, education, and finances.
- Simon Dixon: interview and profile.
- Fundación Gloria Kriete: partnership coverage with WeSpark.

## Frequently asked questions
Q: Who is Adam Nili?
A: A lifelong entrepreneur who has built and advised companies across Latin America, working at the meeting point of energy, finance, and education, and focused on helping people become self-sovereign.

Q: What does Adam Nili work on?
A: He is co-founder and Chief of Staff at Autoridad Panandina, CEO and Founding Partner at Methodos Global, and co-founder and CSO at WeSpark.

Q: What does Adam Nili care about?
A: Empowering people through an entrepreneurial mindset, financial literacy and freedom, and health literacy, tied together by a philosophy of focus and self-sovereignty.

Q: Where is Adam Nili based?
A: Between Medellin, Colombia and El Salvador, working across emerging markets.

## Location and languages
- Based between Medellin, Colombia and El Salvador.
- Works in English and Spanish.
